name: FIRST_DISCLOSURE_DETAILS_BY_TECHCLASS1
description: First disclosure details for a TechnologyClass1 category.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)-[:ORIGIN_FROM]->(o:Origin)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN o.name AS origin, y.year AS first_year, a.name AS assignee, p.pub_no AS pub_no, tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY first_year ASC, pub_no ASC
LIMIT 1

examples: For the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, what were the first origin, first publication year, assignee, publication number, and target pair?
For the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, please return the first origin, first disclosure year, assignee, publication number, and target pair.
In the Angiogenesis related functional combination TechnologyClass1 category, what were the earliest disclosure details?
